allow: Bash(sqlite3 "d:/Users/scale/Code/_scaled-agents/freqmonitor/data/freqmonitor.db" "SELECT error_hash, COUNT\(*\) as cnt, container_name, exit_code, MAX\(created_at\) as last_at, MIN\(created_at\) as first_at FROM agent_failures GROUP BY error_hash ORDER BY cnt DESC;")
